releaseNotes:
- A redesigned book-first workspace now opens each story in a unified book structure, with a single-page asset gallery replacing the old agent-centric workspace
- The new structured production control plane runs image, audio, video, and minigame work as verifiable background jobs, with live milestones, status, cancellation, and delivery checks
- The Gallery is now the production hub, with core-cast prioritization, review toolbars, publish readiness, blocker warnings, regeneration controls, and durable asset version history in one place
- Voice casting now lives in the Gallery, with catalog search, auto-assignment, auditions, direction editing, inline playback, progress, and backend sync
- Starting from scratch and importing a novel now hand off directly to the Lunaverse Agent with the right story context and a prefilled planning prompt
- Character and image production now uses deterministic look tags, centrally delivered production guidance, combined prompt/reference controls, and progressive minigame layers for more consistent output
releaseNotesZh:
- 全新的“以书为中心”工作区会用统一目录打开每个故事，并以单页素材画廊取代旧的 Agent 中心式工作台
- 新的结构化生产控制面可把图片、音频、视频和小游戏任务作为可验证的后台作业执行，并提供实时里程碑、状态、取消与交付校验
- 画廊现已成为统一生产中心：核心角色优先、审核工具栏、发布就绪度、阻塞提示、重生成控制与持久素材版本历史集中在一处
- 配音选角已并入画廊，支持声线库搜索、自动分配、试听、表演指导编辑、内联播放、进度显示与后端同步
- “从零开始”和“导入小说”现在会带着正确的故事上下文及预填规划提示，直接交接给 Lunaverse Agent
- 角色与图片生产现采用确定性的 Look 标签、云端统一下发的生产指导、合并后的提示词/参考图控制，以及渐进式小游戏分层，输出更稳定一致
